# qlik Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "qlik" {
  tenant_id = "pflege-abc"
  region    = "de"
  api_key   = var.qlik_api_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Qlik Cloud API key (used as a Bearer token). Can also be set via `QLIK_API_KEY`.
- `region` (String) Qlik Cloud region code (e.g. `de`, `eu`, `us`). Can also be set via `QLIK_REGION`.
- `tenant_id` (String) Qlik Cloud tenant subdomain (e.g. `pflege-abc`). Can also be set via `QLIK_TENANT_ID`.
